author: w3Lb
content: MEASURED baseline (64MiB corpus, --no-undo): default 4.62s, -q 1.83s, -c 1.62s — diff PRINTING is ~2.8s of the sed gap (sed ~1.0s), confirming the sleeper hypothesis. Plan: (1) cap human diff output at 50 hunks per file + '... and N more' (full diff was never human-readable at 1M hunks); (2) thread context_lines through process_one_file and pass 0 for -q/-c so context strings aren't built when nothing displays them; (3) engine emits context: None when context_lines==0 (avoids 2 empty Vec allocs per change); (4) encoding::encode returns Cow to kill the needless UTF-8 full-buffer copy in write_atomic_encoded; (5) fuse uses_crlf's two full scans into one pass. Re-measure after.
